context: You are generating or enriching Japanese song entries.
Work only on the requested workflow step.
outputRequirements: Follow the active step's field rules exactly.
rules: Do not fabricate copyrighted lyrics that were not provided by the user.
Preserve user-provided lyrics while normalizing obvious whitespace or formatting noise.
Write natural English that stays faithful to the Japanese.
Keep lyric-line and sentence-unit order faithful to the song.
Omit optional fields when they add no value.

steps.title: Metadata Only
steps.goal: Create song shell entries from a song title, album, artist, or seed list without adding lyrics or sentence analysis.
inputContract: The request names one or more songs, albums, artists, or seed descriptors.
Lyrics may be missing at this stage.

fieldRules.description: Stable slug for the song.
Song title as commonly written for the Japanese release or source material.
Artist or group name. Omit only if truly unknown.
Album, single, soundtrack, or release grouping. Omit when unknown.
Release year. Omit when unknown.
Optional genre or style tags.
Optional song-level notes.
Optional machine-friendly tags.
Always set to null at this stage.
Always set to null at this stage.
Always set to null at this stage.

instructions: Do not generate or reconstruct lyrics.

expectedState: The song entry exists with metadata fields filled as confidently as possible.

steps.title: Lyrics And Translation
steps.goal: Populate full-song `ja` and `en` from user-provided Japanese lyrics or a curated lyric paste, without creating sentence units yet.
inputContract: An existing song entry already exists or an id/title is supplied with user-provided Japanese lyrics.
The user provides the lyrics content to be normalized.
preserveRules: Preserve existing metadata unless the request explicitly asks for corrections.
Do not create or modify `sentences` in this step unless the request explicitly asks for sentence extraction too.

fieldRules.description: Full Japanese lyrics, normalized but not rewritten.
Natural English translation of the full lyrics.
Leave null unless the request explicitly asks for sentence extraction in the same pass.

instructions: Normalize formatting, but do not silently rewrite lyric content.
Preserve line order and stanza breaks where they matter.
Stop after filling `ja` and `en` if the request is only for lyrics enrichment.

expectedState: The song entry contains full `ja` and `en` lyrics.
`sentences` remains null unless a combined run explicitly requests sentence extraction.

steps.title: Sentence Units Only
steps.goal: Convert existing lyrics into ordered `sentences` entries with `ja` and `en` only.
inputContract: The song entry already contains `ja` and `en` lyrics.
The request is specifically asking for sentence-unit or lyric-line extraction.
preserveRules: Do not add `chunks` unless the request explicitly asks for chunking too.

fieldRules.description: Lyric line or sentence exactly as it appears in the curated lyrics.
Natural English rendering for that line.
Optional learner notes for that line.
Optional high-value grammar recognition notes.

instructions: Prefer lyric-line units unless the request explicitly asks for a different grouping.

expectedState: The song entry contains ordered `sentences` records with `ja` and `en`.

steps.title: Chunking Only
steps.goal: Add or revise `sentences[].chunks` for existing song sentence units without rewriting the sentence-level content.
inputContract: The song entry already contains `sentences[].ja` and `sentences[].en`.
The request is specifically about chunking, chunk repair, or chunk enrichment.
preserveRules: Do not rewrite existing full-line `ja` and `en` unless the request explicitly asks for corrections.
Apply the same chunking standards used by the Japanese sentences prompt workflow.

fieldRules.description: Chunk text exactly as it appears in the line.
Short learner-friendly English rendering of the chunk.
Meaningful Japanese terms actually present in the chunk.

instructions: Prefer chunking that helps a learner read the line naturally.
Keep chunks ordered and faithful to the line surface form.
Surface meaningful grammar markers when they carry real meaning, such as `はず`.

guidance: Treat this as a staged workflow across multiple AI requests, not a single-pass generation task.
It is valid to stop after any step and resume later.
Retries should rerun only the affected step whenever possible.

prompts.details: Create song shell entries from a provided song title, album, artist, or seed list.
Fill in lyrics and translation for an existing song entry from user-provided Japanese lyrics.
Create `sentences` entries from an existing song entry that already has `ja` and `en` lyrics.
Add learner-friendly chunks to an existing song entry whose `sentences` already contain `ja` and `en`.
Run the full staged workflow for song entries, potentially stopping between steps when later data is missing.
prompts.example: "Create a new song entry shell now; I will paste the lyrics later."
